news.t: RAFI Indices Announces Launch of the Research Affiliates Cap-Weighted US ETF (RAUS)

holdings.infoBox: RAUS is an equity ETF with a total of 519 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.91%, Apple at 6.82%, Alphabet at 6.16%, Microsoft at 4.73%, and Amazon.com at 3.82%.

overview.description: The RACWI US ETF (RAUS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the RACWI US index. The fund is passively managed to track an index that selects US stocks based on four fundamental value factors. Selected positions are then market-cap weighted in the portfolio, aiming to outperform pure market-cap US equity indexes. RAUS was launched on Sep 11, 2025 and is issued by EA Series Trust.

data.title: 3 Great New ETFs From 2025
data.text: These exchange-traded funds offer promising new takes on old ideas.
